mapper.select: SELECT id, name, device_number, category_id, status, approval_mode_override, image_url, description, purchase_date, location, status_change_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM device WHERE device_number = #{deviceNumber} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql:
FROM device d INNER JOIN device_category dc ON dc.id = d.category_id WHERE d.status = 'AVAILABLE'
AND ( LOWER(d.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(dc.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND d.category_id IN
#{categoryId}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation r WHERE r.status IN ('PENDING_DEVICE_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_SYSTEM_APPROVAL', 'PENDING_MANUAL', 'APPROVED') AND r.start_time < #{endTime} AND r.end_time > #{startTime} AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_device rd WHERE rd.reservation_id = r.id AND rd.device_id = d.id ) OR ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_device rd WHERE rd.reservation_id = r.id ) AND r.device_id = d.id ) ) )
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.device_number, d.category_id, d.status, d.approval_mode_override, d.image_url, d.description, d.purchase_date, d.location, d.status_change_reason, d.created_at, d.updated_at
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
